title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 455.200 - Definitions
text:
455.200.  Definitions. — As used in sections 455.200 to 455.230, unless the context clearly requires otherwise, the following words and phrases mean:
  (1)  "Designated authority", the board, commission, agency, or other body designated under the provisions of section 488.445 as the authority to administer the allocation and distribution of funds to shelters;
  (2)  "Shelter for victims of domestic violence" or "shelter", a facility established for the purpose of providing temporary residential service or facilities to family or household members who are victims of domestic violence.
(L. 1982 H.B. 1069 § 2, A.L. 2011 S.B. 320)
